leeds-ja.txt — Japanese word frequency list (most frequent first)

Derived from the University of Leeds Internet Japanese corpus
(http://corpus.leeds.ac.uk/frqc/internet-jp.num), cleanup by William Hingston
(https://github.com/hingston/japanese).

Distributed under the Creative Commons Attribution 2.5 (CC BY 2.5) license:
https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/2.5/

This file keeps only entries containing Japanese characters, deduplicated,
preserving the original frequency order (line number = rank, 1 = most frequent).
